wormhole_core_eth.role: Wormhole Core Bridge on Ethereum — verifies guardian-signed VAAs (parseAndVerifyVM). Modelled on EVM by contracts/WormholeCore.sol.

token_bridge_eth.role: Wormhole Token Bridge on Ethereum — burns/mints wrapped assets in response to verified VAAs. Used by attacker to bridge 93,750 wETH back from Solana to Ethereum after the forged mint.

weth_ethereum.role: Underlying WETH custodied by the Token Bridge; backing for whETH issued on Solana.

non_evm_simulation.reason: The exploit primary chain (Solana) is non-EVM and cannot be replayed in revm. The reconstruction in contracts/ models the trust boundary that broke (verify_signatures accepting an unauthenticated Sysvar Instructions account) on EVM via WormholeCore.verifySignaturesLegacy. Full Solana-side reproduction would require an SVM harness — see paper Section 6.
modelled_path: Wrapped whETH on Solana -> WrappedAsset on benchmark EVM
out_of_scope: Re-bridging the 93,750 forged whETH from Solana back to Ethereum (Module 3 single-chain fuzz only).

root_cause_summary.vulnerable_pattern: Solana verify_signatures instruction accepted a caller-supplied `instructions` Sysvar account without validating it equalled the canonical Sysvar1nstructions1111 address. The post-verification record was trusted by complete_wrapped.
root_cause_summary.verification_bypass: Attacker passed a forged instructions account whose contents claimed guardian signatures had been verified, then submitted a VAA to complete_wrapped which minted 120,000 whETH on Solana with no backing.
root_cause_summary.notes: The bug is a target-account-validation failure (verifying *which* account holds the signature record), not a cryptographic flaw in ECDSA itself. Classified as V1 because the cross-chain message authenticity invariant is the one violated.

exploit_characteristics.style: VAA forgery via unauthenticated signature-record account
exploit_characteristics.notes: One forged verify_signatures + one complete_wrapped on Solana (120,000 whETH minted), followed by ~93,750 wETH bridged back to Ethereum across multiple txs. Jump Crypto reimbursed the protocol on 2022-02-03.

references.title: Extropy IO — Solana Wormhole hack post-mortem analysis
